title: Build and Test an MCP Server with Official SDKs · Extension Lens: Sdk Selection
summary: Implement a typed server with tools, resources, and automated protocol tests. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext sdk selection increment in a runnable tested MCP server. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select an official maintained SDK and pin a compatible protocol target.
Log identifiers, latency, errors, and side effects without leaking protocol secrets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
